name: Karen's Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 can premium white chunk chicken, drained (12 oz)
2 Granny Smith apples, cored, peeled and diced
2 stalks celery, washed, trimmed and diced (up to 3)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients; toss to combine.
Presentation: Serve as a main dish salad or as a sandwich on a flaky croissant with alfalfa sprouts, Swiss cheese and tomato.
Yield: 4-6 servings
